name: finish-work-complete-your-current-task-and-prepa
title: ## Finish Work Complete your current task and prepare for `dijiang finish-work`.
description:
## Finish Work

Complete your current task and prepare for `dijiang finish-work`.

Steps:
1. Run relevant checks or tests
2. Verify type checks pass when applicable
3. Run `dj-check` if code changed
4. Record findings or lessons with `dijiang mem findings` / `dijiang mem learn`
5. Finish with `dijiang finish-work --verification "..."`
